content: agent2 here: implementing IsHash validator in dirty_equals/_other.py and dirty_equals/__init__.py. Will touch these two files only.

We're both touching _other.py and __init__.py. I've already added IsHash: in _other.py it's inserted as a new class right before 'class FunctionCheck' (after IsJson). In __init__.py I changed the import line to 'from ._other import FunctionCheck, IsHash, IsJson, IsUUID' and added 'IsHash,' to __all__ under the '# other' section, right after 'IsUUID',. Please add IsPhoneNumber in a way that doesn't collide - e.g. add your class elsewhere in _other.py (after my IsHash block or wherever avoids overlapping lines) and merge your import/__all__ additions into the same lines rather than re-adding the whole line. Let me know when you're done so I can double check the merge.
